untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of consolidation pattern (range-bound price action for N bars) and support penetration depth measurement, which cannot be expressed as single-bar indicator conditions. The pattern recognition of 'consolidation duration', 'support penetration threshold percentage', and 'bars to confirm reversal' require multi-bar lookback logic not available in the allowed operators and indicators. Approximated as: price crosses above S1 (support pivot) on volume confirmation, but this loses the consolidation detection and precise failure-test entry nuance.
translation_notes: Used pivot level s1 as proxy for support; used hvol_20 as volume confirmation multiplier; actual signal requires tracking consolidation range bounds and support penetration depth over multiple bars. Consider implementing custom multi-bar pattern detection outside this JSON rule engine.
